creator: patl@Phoenix.Volant.ORG
text:
With ports CVSup'd on 16 October, 2000:

Attempting to install the staroffice52 port using WITH_CDROM continues
to tell me to mount the cd on /cdrom; even when it is already mounted.

If I also explicitly specify CD_MOUNTPT=/cdrom then it tries to fetch
the distribution tarballs from the various master sites instead of using
the CD-ROM

How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/editors/staroffice52
make WITH_CDROM=yes install
